contexts.context: ...We ought to be content that Lucia, a <mark>Milanese</mark> peasant, should have for a husband a person...
...But the want of moral energy that blinds a <mark>Milanese</mark> to the real evils that afflict his country,...
...cause, for he is a Tuscan. The <mark>Milanese</mark> must go back to the days of Frederic Barbarossa...
